CVE-2011-4604.title: The bat_socket_read function in net/batman-adv/icmp_socket.c in t ...
CVE-2011-4604.description: The bat_socket_read function in net/batman-adv/icmp_socket.c in the Linux kernel before 3.3 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (memory corruption) or possibly have unspecified other impact via a crafted batman-adv ICMP packet.
